title: Closing a window vs. quitting
drDigitalIntro:
Closing and quitting are not the same thing.
• Closing a window moves it aside, but the app keeps running.
• Quitting shuts the app down completely.
• A minimized app shows a little green dot on its icon.
drDigitalSuccess: Exactly — out of the way isn't the same as off. You now know the difference!
drDigitalHint: In the playground, minimize an app with the minus button and notice it keeps everything for when you come back. Then click Continue.
